title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE ILIGAN CITY HOSPITAL IN PALA-O, ILIGAN CITY, PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL NORTE, TO GREGORIO T. LLUCH, SR., MEMORIAL HOSPITAL

chunks.text:
H. NO. 22854 / 88 OG No. 19, 2805 (May 11, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7310, March 30, 1992 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE ILIGAN CITY HOSPITAL IN PALA-O, ILIGAN CITY, PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL NORTE, TO GREGORIO T. LLUCH, SR., MEMORIAL HOSPITAL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Iligan City Hospital in Pala-o, Iligan City, Province of Lanao del Norte, is hereby changed to Gregorio T. Lluch, Sr., Memorial Hospital.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on July 20, 1990 and January 23, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: March 30, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
